title: Fix 5 fresh ready beads per AGENTS.md review workflow
description: Select 5 new beads excluding listed priors. Claim, use explore subagents for analysis per rules, implement fixes following LICHEN/Zephyr/Rust conventions (no dead code, no comments, exact test vectors, security), run codereview 3x per bead filing only real P0-P2 as new beads, verify all lints/builds/tests, close with precise reasons. Parallel subagents where possible. No dolt push. Final output only status summary.
